reasoning: Emotional (60%): The explosion reads warm and energetic — saturated orange/yellow with a white-hot core fits the bright Hyrule toy-diorama mood well. The starburst silhouette is round and friendly, not grim. Small cyan sparkle accents visible at larger zoom are a minor palette mismatch; they cool the otherwise warm explosion and nudge away from the 'bright/warm' axis. Score ~7.5. Technical (40%): Hard shading is present with roughly 3 tones (white core → orange → dark-orange edge). Pixels are grid-snapped with no visible anti-aliasing. The radiating spike shapes are hand-pixeled and irregular in a natural way. However, Denzi-tier sprites tend to have a 1px dark bounding outline or shadow base to anchor the sprite in-world; this explosion floats without that grounding ring. Score ~7.0. Weighted composite: (7.5×0.6)+(7.0×0.4)=7.3 → rounded to 7. Marginal — passes mood test but cyan accents and lack of anchor outline are addressable issues before promotion.
